title: Darrell Lea Dad’s Bag
content_raw:
```html

Darrell Lea Dad's Bag! Whether its the dad who has everything, the grandfather with a sweet tooth or the father-in-law whom you struggle to select for, the Darrell Lea Dads Bag is the surest way to win hearts and appetites this Fathers Day. Now in its 24th year - the Darrell Lea Dads Bag contains an assortment of favourites, including liquorice, hand-crafted chocolates and confectionery, which if you're lucky, he may be willing to share...

The Darrell Lea Dads Bag is available from mid-August, in the lead up to Fathers Day which falls this year on 6th September. If you're looking for other candy gift boxes and sweet hampers, the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag is one of the most popular seasonal options for Australian families.

Frequently Asked Questions

What exactly is included in the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag?

The Darrell Lea Dad's Bag contains an assortment of Darrell Lea favourites including liquorice, hand-crafted chocolates, and confectionery. The exact contents may vary by year, but it's designed to offer a mix of the brand's most popular treats.

You may also want to buy

  • 2026 Darrell Lea Ginger Dark Chocolate Egg Easter Pack$24.99
  • 2026 Darrell Lea Milk Bullets Easter Egg Pack$24.99
  • 2026 Darrell Lea Mint Balls Easter Egg Pack$24.99

When does the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag become available each year?

The Darrell Lea Dad's Bag is available from mid-August each year, timed perfectly for Father's Day shopping. In 2024, Father's Day falls on 6th September, giving you plenty of time to order before the celebration.

Is the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag a limited edition product?

Yes, the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag is a seasonal limited edition product that's only available around Father's Day each year. Now in its 24th year, it's become a traditional Father's Day gift for many Australian families. Like other seasonal candy offerings in Australia, the Dad's Bag is highly anticipated by customers who know they need to order early to secure stock.

Who would the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag be suitable for as a gift?

The Darrell Lea Dad's Bag is perfect for dads with a sweet tooth, grandfathers, fathers-in-law, or any father figure in your life. It's ideal if you're struggling to find the right gift for someone who seems to have everything. Whether you're assembling party bags for a celebration or putting together a special gift hamper, Darrell Lea's assortment of premium chocolates and liquorice works beautifully as a centrepiece.

Can I order the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag online?

Yes, you can order the Darrell Lea Dad's Bag from Sweet's World online at sweetsworld.com.au. Orders are available from mid-August during the Father's Day season, subject to stock availability. We also stock a range of other candy hampers and sweet gifts year-round if you're looking for alternative gift options.

```
